Excellent! Let me create a final summary with absolute file paths as requested:
## Summary
I have successfully renamed the `CodexPromptExecutor` class to `CodexCliPromptExecutor` across the codebase. Here's what was changed:
### Files Modified (4 total)
**1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/codex_prompt_executor.py`** - Renamed class definition from `CodexPromptExecutor` to `CodexCliPromptExecutor` (line 150) - Updated module docstring to reflect new class name (line 3) - Updated `__init__` docstring to use new class name (line 154)
**2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/context.py`** - Updated import: `from erk.core.codex_prompt_executor import CodexCliPromptExecutor` (line 21) - Updated `create_prompt_executor()` docstring (line 101) - Updated function return statement: `return CodexCliPromptExecutor(console=console)` (line 112) - Note: `ClaudePromptExecutor` was intentionally left unchanged
**3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/core/test_codex_prompt_executor.py`** - Updated import: `from erk.core.codex_prompt_executor import CodexCliPromptExecutor` (line 240) - Updated instantiation: `executor = CodexCliPromptExecutor(console=None)` (line 242)
**4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/core/test_context.py`** - Updated import: `from erk.core.codex_prompt_executor import CodexCliPromptExecutor` (line 7) - Updated test docstring (line 96) - Updated isinstance assertion: `assert isinstance(executor, CodexCliPromptExecutor)` (line 111)
### Verification - All 26 tests pass in the affected test files - Only the intended 4 files were modified - No unintended changes to other files (e.g., `ClaudePromptExecutor` remains unchanged) - The file itself (`codex_prompt_executor.py`) was NOT renamed, only the class within it
This completes **Step 2** of the "Flat prompt executor namespace + kill LlmCaller" plan. The next step would be to rename `ClaudePromptExecutor` to `ClaudeCliPromptExecutor` across the codebase.
